diagnostics.message: result has no inline message.text or message.markdown
diagnostics.remediation: add an inline result message before uploading to GitHub Code Scanning

diagnostics.message: physical location has an empty artifactLocation.uri
diagnostics.remediation: set artifactLocation.uri to a non-empty repository-relative path

diagnostics.message: artifact path is missing from the checkout or is not a regular file
diagnostics.remediation: make the scanner URI relative to the checked-out repository and point it to a regular file

diagnostics.message: artifact path escapes the repository root after normalization
diagnostics.remediation: emit a repository-relative artifact URI that remains inside the checkout
